action.text: if exists(select 1 from hrrmhtktr where ma_ht = @$ma_ht and ma_vong = @$ma_vong) begin select '' as array$, rtrim(a.ma_ktr) as ma_ktr, b.ten_ktr%l from hrrmhtktr a left join hrdmktr b on a.ma_ktr = b.ma_ktr where a.ma_ht = @$ma_ht and a.ma_vong = @$ma_vong order by ma_ht, line_nbr return end

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@table a left join hrdmktr b on a.ma_ktr = b.ma_ktr where stt_rec = @stt_rec order by @@orderByClause

title.v: Lấy số liệu từ yêu cầu kiểm tra$$90
